verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus ipsi David.   Cantate Domino canticum novum,  quia mirabilia fecit.  Salvavit sibi dextera ejus,  et brachium sanctum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִזְמ֡וֹר שִׁ֤ירוּ לַיהֹוָ֨ה ׀ שִׁ֣יר חָ֭דָשׁ כִּֽי־נִפְלָא֣וֹת עָשָׂ֑ה הוֹשִׁיעָה־לּ֥וֹ יְ֝מִינ֗וֹ וּזְר֥וֹעַ קׇדְשֽׁוֹ׃
verses.king_james: O sing unto the Lord a new song; for he hath done marvellous things: his right hand, and his holy arm, hath gotten him the victory.

verses.latin_vulgate: Notum fecit Dominus salutare suum ;  in conspectu gentium revelavit justitiam suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹדִ֣יעַ יְ֭הֹוָה יְשׁוּעָת֑וֹ לְעֵינֵ֥י הַ֝גּוֹיִ֗ם גִּלָּ֥ה צִדְקָתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord hath made known his salvation: his righteousness hath he openly shewed in the sight of the heathen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Recordatus est misericordiæ suæ,  et veritatis suæ domui Israël.  Viderunt omnes termini terræ  salutare Dei nostri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זָ֘כַ֤ר חַסְדּ֨וֹ ׀ וֶ֥אֱֽמוּנָתוֹ֮ לְבֵ֢ית יִשְׂרָ֫אֵ֥ל רָא֥וּ כׇל־אַפְסֵי־אָ֑רֶץ אֵ֝֗ת יְשׁוּעַ֥ת אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: He hath remembered his mercy and his truth toward the house of Israel: all the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jubilate Deo, omnis terra ;  cantate, et exsultate, et psallite.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָרִ֣יעוּ לַ֭יהֹוָה כׇּל־הָאָ֑רֶץ פִּצְח֖וּ וְרַנְּנ֣וּ וְזַמֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.king_james: Make a joyful noise unto the Lord, all the earth: make a loud noise, and rejoice, and sing praise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Psallite Domino in cithara ;  in cithara et voce psalmi ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זַמְּר֣וּ לַיהֹוָ֣ה בְּכִנּ֑וֹר בְּ֝כִנּ֗וֹר וְק֣וֹל זִמְרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Sing unto the Lord with the harp; with the harp, and the voice of a psalm.

verses.latin_vulgate: in tubis ductilibus, et voce tubæ corneæ.  Jubilate in conspectu regis Domini :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּ֭חֲצֹ֣צְרוֹת וְק֣וֹל שׁוֹפָ֑ר הָ֝רִ֗יעוּ לִפְנֵ֤י ׀ הַמֶּ֬לֶךְ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: With trumpets and sound of cornet make a joyful noise before the Lord, the King.

verses.latin_vulgate: moveatur mare, et plenitudo ejus ;  orbis terrarum, et qui habitant in eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִרְעַ֣ם הַ֭יָּם וּמְלֹא֑וֹ תֵּ֝בֵ֗ל וְיֹ֣שְׁבֵי בָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: Let the sea roar, and the fulness thereof; the world, and they that dwell therein.

verses.latin_vulgate: Flumina plaudent manu ;  simul montes exsultabunt
verses.king_james: Let the floods clap their hands: let the hills be joyful together

verses.latin_vulgate: a conspectu Domini :  quoniam venit judicare terram.  Judicabit orbem terrarum in justitia,  et populos in æquitate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִ֥פְֽנֵי־יְהֹוָ֗ה כִּ֥י בָא֮ לִשְׁפֹּ֢ט הָ֫אָ֥רֶץ יִשְׁפֹּֽט־תֵּבֵ֥ל בְּצֶ֑דֶק וְ֝עַמִּ֗ים בְּמֵישָׁרִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Before the Lord; for he cometh to judge the earth: with righteousness shall he judge the world, and the people with equity.
